name: Iron Psycho: RETRO
short_description: Iron Psycho: RETRO is a retro First-Person shooter in which the player must eliminate all threats aboard the ship and collect keys to reach the end of each level. Some levels contain secrets.
detailed_description:
In Iron Psycho: RETRO, you are a scifi-futuristic soldier aboard a ship infested with insectoids and croco-aliens. Your duty is to clear the ship of the threat. Fight your way through 5 levels collecting keys and eliminating enemies in your way.

The game features:

Singleplayer Campaign containing 5 levels.

All campaign levels contain various secrets.


3 Weapons:

-Shotgun, Pistol, SMG


6 Different Enemies:

-Grasshopperman

-Roachman

-Crawlers

-Flying grasshopper girl

-Croco-aliens

-Croco-alien leader
